free_text: Fragment emission mechanism in the 32S+12C reaction
Homi Bhabha National Institute, Mumbai
BARC-TIFR Pelletron-Linac facility.
A self-supported 12C target of thickness ~390 ug/cm2.
Single-sided ~50-um-thick Si(delta E)
strip detector (16 vertical strips of 3 mm width) and
a double-sided ~525-um-thick Si (E) strip detector
(16 strips, width 3 mm, both sides mutually orthogonal
to each other).
The Silicon detectors were backed by four
CsI(Tl) detectors, each of thickness 6 cm. The solid
angle subtended by each detector were ~3 msr.
The systematic errors in the data, arising
from the uncertainties in the measurements of target
thickness, solid angle and the calibration of current
digitizer, have been estimated to be ~15%
Data request sent to R.Pandey on 19th Feb. 2018 but
without success.
